sections.paragraph:
Original: צרתן

Transliteration: tsârethân

Phonetic: tsaw-reth-awn'

BDB Definition:

Zarthan or Zaretan = "their distress"
  1. a place in the Jordan valley where the river parted for Israel to pass over for the conquest of Canaan
    1. site unknown

Origin: perhaps for H6868

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
